title: Cybersecurity Graduate Certificate - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Cybersecurity Graduate Certificate - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Cybersecurity Graduate Certificate
Apply now
Request info
The Cybersecurity Graduate Certificate will introduce you to the basic principles of securing computer and information systems, laying the groundwork for a promising cybersecurity career. Get a strong start in the industry by focusing on areas like workstation security, cybercrime, and intrusion detection. Or, if you’re interested in continuing your education, this certificate will prepare you for the
MS in Cybersecurity
program.
Explore program requirements in the course catalog
Program details
Advance your career
Advance your career
Upon completion of the Cybersecurity Graduate Certificate, many students choose to pursue the full
MS in Cybersecurity
degree. You will also be prepared for careers like:
Information security risk analyst
Product security operator
Security consultant
Security investigation analyst
Learning outcomes
Learning outcomes
When you complete this certificate, you will be able to:
Defend industrial enterprises using state-of-the-art methods and technologies.
Build core knowledge around system and network security theory, processes, and practices.
Plan and implement security strategies that reduce risk and protect information assets.
Identify, contextualize, and address legal and ethical issues associated with information security, privacy, and digital rights.
Communicate with corporate management on information assurance issues.
Continue a lifelong learning process in the fast-changing cyber threat environment.
Campus location
Boston
Located in the heart of Boston, Northeastern’s oldest campus is home to a vibrant community of students, researchers, and faculty working across disciplines to build a better world through CS.
Explore Boston's campus

Meet our faculty
Get to know the engaged, experienced professors who are here to support you every step of the way.
View all faculty
Jose Sierra
Jose Sierra is a teaching professor at Khoury College, and the associate director of the information assurance and cybersecurity program. He runs the EVALUES IT Security Laboratory, where he explores assessment methodologies for commercial implementations of IPSEC architecture in such areas as the aerospace defense and the telecoms sectors.
Read bio
Break into tech without a computer science background
If you don’t have a background in computer science or cybersecurity, then the Align MS in Computer Science or Align MS in Cybersecurity might be for you. These programs offer a direct path to a master’s degree — with no prior experience required.
Learn about the Align program
Related programs
Data Analytics Graduate Certificate
The Data Analytics Graduate Certificate provides a strong foundation in data analytics while preparing you for success in a range of careers and master’s programs.
